ab: setangi upitu duki maseq iku ta taqsian.
en: I arrived at school at seven today.

ab: siangatu ti temaqsi, semuRem ti patudan ta tudan, semanu ti ya pancang,“ qiRi ka! subat ka!”
ch: 上課了，老師走進教室，班長說:「起立!敬禮!」
en: It’s time for class , the teacher walked into the classroom, and the monitor said: “Stand up! Salute!”

ab: temaqsi nani, temud patudan timaimian tu sabidangan ay sikawman na kebalan.
ch: 上課的時候，老師教我們數字的族語。
en: In class, the teacher taught us the Kebalan language of numbers.

ab: qeminunung imi tu patudan meliyam, satezay ti imi tu sabidang ay satezayan.
ch: 我們跟著老師唸，我們唱了數字歌。
en: We followed the teacher to read, we sang the number song.

ab: muwaza ti nisinanam niaq tu sikawman na kebalan.
en: I have learned many Kebalan languages.

ab: pitemawaR iku temaqsi, pitemawaR iku sinanam tu sikawman na kebalan, tankebalan pa iku tu tina paipil.
ch: 我天天上學，我天天學族語，我要講給媽媽聽。
en: I go to school every day, I learn the Kebalan language every day, and I want to tell my mother.
